hypothesis: For direct-force pre-trained neural network interatomic potentials, the root-mean-square difference between conservative forces (−∇ĤE) and direct force outputs (ĤFnc) (U∆) serves as a data-free uncertainty metric that reliably correlates with true force prediction error on equilibrium and adversarially perturbed out-of-distribution structures and outperforms intra-family ensemble variance in detecting high-error/OOD cases.
